2026-04-08T18:36:15.1335447Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T18:36:15.1337066Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T18:36:15.1337512Z 
2026-04-08T18:36:15.1337699Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T18:36:15.1338017Z
